data.content: Approved in implementation review. Commit 835f1b37 removes the redundant static Escalations action from ActionButton by returning null for beatsView=finalcut, leaving the ViewSwitcher Escalations tab unchanged. Added unit coverage in src/components/__tests__/app-header-parts.test.ts asserting ActionButton returns null for finalcut. Validation re-run passed: bun run test -- src/components/__tests__/app-header-parts.test.ts, bun run lint (existing warning only in src/components/beat-form.tsx:368), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run build.
